title: 1) Distal points
text:
Basically, the practitioner chooses the acupoints based on patient's individual condition.
For instance, if the patient has a sallow face with a spleen deﬁciency, constipation and
pimples around jaw, which is the Large Intestine Meridian, the diagnosis would be spleen
deﬁciency and Large Intestine Meridian blockage. SP-3, LI-4, or ST-36 would be the ﬁrst
choice, or you can set up your own treatment recipe based on the diagnosis.
The following is the most commonly used distal acupoints for cosmetic acupuncture.
~ !  ~
54
ST-36
SP-3
SP-6
LI-4
LV-3
Facial  Cosmetic Acupuncture
